Confidential Term Sheet (MAR wall-crossing) — AlpenNord Renewables SE (EU issuer; Project Helion).
Proposed transaction: acquisition of 85% of Solistra Grid GmbH for €218m, funded by €150m senior unsecured green notes due 2033 and an €80m convertible loan from Vistaro Capital S.à r.l.; settlement in cash at completion.
Listing/issuer context: issuer shares listed on EuroCentral Exchange (ECX), Prime Green Segment; the proposed financing will not be admitted to trading; information herein is precise and non-public until formal announcement.
Financial impact (MNPI): expected FY2027 pro forma EBITDA uplift 22–26% with €14–18m annual run-rate cost synergies; integration costs €9–12m; guidance not yet disclosed under EU MAR.
Conditions precedent: merger clearances in Velmark and Ostland; lender consent; completion of CSRD double-materiality assessment for the combined group; sustainability KPIs calibrated to an SFDR Article 9-aligned framework; long stop 30 Sept 2026.
Confidentiality and process: recipients are wall-crossed and must maintain insider lists; clean team protocol for competitively sensitive data; data room session keys (e.g., DRS-8812-Q4) are system-generated and not personal.
GDPR and special categories: no special category data (GDPR Art 9) will be shared, save for aggregated workforce diversity percentages required for CSRD/SFDR PAI; no health or biometric information to be collected or processed.
Cross-border personal data transfers: processing primarily within the EEA; limited transfer to CloudArc Analytics Ltd (Aurinia, non-EEA) for model hosting under EU SCCs with encryption at rest and pseudonymisation; transfer impact assessment completed and available on request.
Primary treasury contact (operational PII cluster): Ms. Lara Vost (born 12.03.1984; Head of Treasury, AlpenNord Renewables SE; based in Nordstadt, Velmark; l.vost@alpennord.eu; corporate device ID ANR-LTP-9931; remote session reference TS-2026-04-ECX; settlement account IBAN XY34 1234 5678 9012 3456 78).
Generic operational note (non-identifying): target’s field technicians are typically mid-30s and use Galeon 10 handsets across Nordport and Eastvale depots; this demographic/device information is aggregated and does not identify any individual.
Economics: indicative coupon on notes 5.10–5.40% p.a.; use of proceeds 100% EU Taxonomy-eligible grid upgrades and digital substations; predicted net leverage post-close 3.2x with deleveraging to ≤2.5x in 18 months.
Covenants and protections: change-of-control put at 101%; gross leverage covenant ≤3.5x; restricted payments blocked until NFD/EBITDA <2.5x for two consecutive quarters; MAC includes loss of Velmark grid concession or revocation of Ostland interconnection rights.
Timing and disclosure: target signing 14 June 2026; announcement planned for 17 June 2026 at 07:30 CET via ECX Regulated News Service; inside information controls in place; leakage protocol and standstill undertakings agreed.
Sanctions/AML/KYC: standard EU AML checks to apply to investors; no onboarding of high-risk third countries; politically exposed person screening performed at fund level with no individual data shared beyond legal basis.
Notices and contacts: financing queries to dealdesk@vistaro-cap.eu and IR queries to ir@alpennord.eu; do not print if accessed via device ANR-LTP-9931 kiosk mode; handling of personal data per GDPR and confidentiality per MAR until publication.
